name: ghanshyam-tailor-system
description: ઘનશ્યામ Ladies Tailor - Complete Tailor Management System (MERN Stack)

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: start http://localhost:3000 && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
